message:
fix: resolve clippy warnings across frankenterm-core and sync beads

Address clippy lints in 10 files to keep CI clean:

- lfu_cache.rs: suppress unused return from cache.peek() with let _
- native_events.rs: use std::io::Error::other() shorthand, bind _elapsed
  for clarity in timeout error arm
- recorder_lexical_ingest.rs: Error::other(), String::new() instead of
  "".to_string(), remove unnecessary u64 cast on count values
- recorder_lexical_schema.rs: use .count() instead of .collect::<Vec<_>>
  ().len(), remove redundant .clone() in test
- swarm_scheduler.rs: replace assert_eq! on f64 with epsilon comparisons
- swarm_work_queue.rs: use &str borrow for HashMap::get instead of
  &String, exhaustive match instead of wildcard in error variant test
- sync.rs: use .count() instead of collect+len, use Path::extension()
  instead of string ends_with for file extension check
- tantivy_reindex.rs: simplify loop-break-for-break pattern to single
  batch iteration since 8 events fit in one batch
- tui/app.rs: String::new() instead of "".to_string() in 3 test sites
- tui/mod.rs: Path::extension() instead of ends_with(".rs") in guardrails

Also syncs .beads/issues.jsonl with latest issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
